title: Lcl Streak Across the Night Sky
display_title: Lcl Streak Across the Night Sky
wikitext:
[]: Lcl Streak Across the Night Sky             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:15 pm Is this scene supposed to be symbolism for maybe, and please be gentle, a certain part of female anatomy? Or is this common knowledge already? That's what I thought when I first saw it. Or am I crazy?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:21 pm ...Certain part of the female anatomy? The neck? You know... because it came out of a neck?

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:29 pm But it doesn't LOOK like a neck. http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-m26/m26_C463_big.jpg That's the streak.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:37 pm ...a butt?

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:43 pm Vaginas make many odd and vaguely disturbing appearances in EoE, but I don't think that's one of them.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:43 pm I can't find a picture, but it resembles the scene where the lance goes into GNR's "forehead." Not for anyone else?

[]: Re: Lcl Streak Across the Night Sky             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:44 pm perfected_sound wrote: Is this scene supposed to be symbolism for

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:44 pm Sandoz wrote: Vaginas make many odd and vaguely disturbing appearances on EoE, but I don't think that's one of them.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:49 pm perfected_sound wrote: That's the only bush I'm beating around, then.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Sat Sep 08, 2007 1:54 pm NAveryW wrote: perfected_sound wrote: That's the only bush I'm beating around, then.

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Sat Sep 08, 2007 2:19 pm I think that he means the streak of blood formed when GGNR started squirting (lol) blood from her neck (like some kind of mega hickey, maybe?). This image is what I mean:

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 2:22 pm He... he already posted that...

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Sat Sep 08, 2007 2:24 pm NAveryW wrote: He... he already posted that...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 3:14 pm It's just simply the LCL Streak from Lilith's neck. That's it.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:08 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: It's just simply the LCL Streak from Lilith's neck. That's it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:11 pm Except that.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:52 pm NAveryW wrote: Except that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 5:02 pm Not EVERY single thing means something "deep" in Eva. Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 5:17 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Not EVERY single thing means something "deep" in Eva. Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Sat Sep 08, 2007 9:34 pm CitizenGeek wrote: NAveryW wrote: Except that.
